sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Trace all transitions to understand the game
print("=== ALL TRANSITIONS ===")
for i, t in enumerate(transitions):
    print(f"\n--- Transition {i}: {t.action} ---")
    after_seg = t.after_frame.segmentation
    # Get key objects
    objs = []
    for n in after_seg['nodes']:
        c = n['color']
        p = n['pixels']
        if 4 <= p <= 50:
            b = n['boundary']
            center_r = sum([pt[0] for pt in b]) // len(b)
            center_c = sum([pt[1] for pt in b]) // len(b)
            objs.append((c, p, center_r, center_c, n['hash'][:8]))
    for c, p, r, co, h in objs:
        print(f"  {c} p={p} ({r},{co}) h={h}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
